category_sources: source_facts.description says Julius is a two-pass large vocabulary continuous speech recognition engine; official GitHub README describes Julius as an open-source LVCSR engine.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Julius; source_facts.name is julius.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README states up-to-date documentation is provided in the repository doc/ directory and also includes quick run/install guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/julius-speech/julius, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies speech recognition; official GitHub README documents LVCSR decoding, audio input, language models, acoustic models, and command-line usage.
